name: BATMAN IS UNIKITTY!?
description:
(No, this isn't a yandere bullshit, but trust me, this is better)

You are the prince of crime AKA, The Joker, and your legacy is beginning

And it is your first time meeting batman in person

But....it was not the batman you expected nor wanted at all

I think i should call this AU "Sweet justice" (Get it?)

If this gets good, i'll make the same one but based on arkham knight
creator: A_N_X_I_E_T_Y
